data.title: Euna Solutions Opens Nominations for 2026 Euna Impact Awards
data.description: Euna Solutions®, a prominent provider of top-notch SaaS solutions tailored for the public sector, has revealed that nominations for the 2026 Euna Impact Awards are now open. This prestigious awards program highlights the accomplishments of Euna’s public sector clients who leverage technology to instigate substantial transformations in their communities. The event serves as a platform to acknowledge the individuals and groups that are translating innovation into tangible results, celebrating the impactful work being done within the community.

data.title: Transocean Ltd. Announces Contract Awards Totaling $1.0 Billion and Retirement of Senior Secured Notes
data.description: Today in Steinausen, Switzerland, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) revealed new contracts and extensions for their drilling projects. They secured a contract for a harsh environment semisubmersible in Norway, along with extending contracts for two ultra-deepwater drillships in Brazil. These agreements are expected to bring in around $1.0 billion in additional firm contract backlog.

data.title: Yonyou AI Lab Introduces Framework to Make Enterprise AI Decisions Traceable and Auditable
data.description: The Yonyou AI Lab recently unveiled a preprint on April 2, 2026, introducing the ontology harness. This framework aims to ensure that enterprise AI decisions are traceable, verifiable, and auditable. The lab's research addresses the accountability crisis within enterprise AI and emphasizes the importance of transparency. This initiative provides a systematic approach to enhance decision-making processes, reflecting the increasing need for accountability and reliability in the AI sector.

data.title: TotalEnergies Bets On Asia's Clean Energy Boom With Masdar Joint Venture
data.description: TotalEnergies SE (NYSE: TTE) saw its shares rise as it announced a significant clean-energy collaboration, focusing on expanding its presence in Asia. The French energy company is teaming up with Abu Dhabi Future Energy Company PJSC (Masdar) in a 50/50 joint venture valued at $2.2 billion. This partnership combines their onshore renewable energy portfolios across nine countries. The joint venture aims to achieve a total of 3 gigawatts (GW) of operational capacity, alongside an extra 6 GW in advanced development, with projects slated to be operational by 2030. Located in Abu Dhabi Global Market, the venture will have around 200 employees from both firms. Upon completion, the JV will serve as the main entity for constructing and operating onshore solar, wind, and battery storage facilities in Azerbaijan, Indonesia, Japan, Kazakhstan, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Uzbekistan. This news story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Net Lease, Inc. Announces Retirement of Two Board Members
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Global Net Lease, Inc. revealed that Sue Perrotty and Governor Edward Rendell will retire from the Company's Board of Directors following the 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. They will not seek re-election at the Annual Meeting.

data.title: Arch Biopartners Closes Non-Brokered Private Placement
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Arch Biopartners Inc. disclosed the completion of a non-brokered private placement. This initiative involved the sale of 1,000,000 common shares at a rate of $0.60 per share, resulting in total earnings of $600,000 CAD. The company is known by its stock symbols TSX Venture: ARCH and OTCQB: ACHFF.

data.title: IRS Data Shows Average Tax Refunds Jump 10.9% In 2026 Filing Season
data.description: The average tax refunds in the United States for the 2026 filing season have shown an increase based on recent data from the IRS. As of March 20, the average refund amount was reported to be $3,571, marking a $350 rise compared to last year, a 10.9% increase from $3,221. In terms of total refund payments, the IRS has dispersed over $202 billion so far, surpassing the $179 billion issued in the previous year. The total number of refunds also saw an uptick, reaching around 56.7 million, showcasing a 1.8% increase. Although there has been a rise in refund amounts, the overall pace of filing seems to have slowed down slightly. The total returns received decreased by 0.9% to 78.9 million, with processed returns also dropping by 1.1% to 77.8 million. Self-prepared returns have seen a 1.9% increase, totaling over 37.8 million, whereas filings done by tax professionals declined by 1% to 39.7 million.

data.title: Thunderstruck Ag Delivers Measurable Harvest Performance Gains in Brazil
data.description: In Sao Paulo, Thunderstruck Ag is increasing its footprint in Brazil by providing reliable harvest technologies that enhance operational productivity and financial gains. Showcasing its success at Agrishow 2026, the company emphasizes its strong presence in the Brazilian market and the substantial performance improvements its solutions offer in practical harvesting scenarios. Founded by Jeremy Matuszewski, Thunderstruck Ag collaborates with farmers and engineers to deliver effective solutions for the industry.

data.title: IDEX Corporation to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: IDEX Corporation (NYSE:IEX) from Northbrook, Illinois, is set to announce its first quarter 2026 results on April 29, 2026, before the market opens. Their CEO Eric Ashleman and CFO Sean Gillen will host an investor conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. (CT) on the same day. The webcast for the event and earnings presentation will be in listen-only mode.

data.title: Allocate Partners with Valhalla Group to Accelerate Private Markets Operations
data.description: In a recent announcement from San Francisco, Allocate, a private markets infrastructure platform catering to wealth advisors and fund managers, revealed a new strategic partnership with Valhalla Group, a private equity firm under the leadership of Trey Hart, a former executive at Northern Trust. As part of this collaboration, Valhalla Group will utilize Allocate's advanced technology infrastructure to improve portfolio monitoring and simplify fundraising processes. This partnership underscores Allocate's commitment to offering private markets solutions.

data.title: Triton Digital Selected by NBC Sports to Power Podcast Hosting, Measurement, and Monetization
data.description: In New York, Triton Digital®, a global technology and services company for the digital audio, podcast, and broadcast radio sectors, has been chosen by NBC Sports to enhance its podcast and digital audio operations. Utilizing various Triton technologies, NBC Sports will benefit from superior hosting, monetization, audience measurement, and insights tools to boost its expanding podcast and digital audio offerings. This move signifies a strategic advancement for NBC Sports in optimizing its digital audio strategy, benefitting from Triton Digital's expertise in these areas.

data.title: restor3d Announces Full Commercial Release of the Aeros™ Modular Stem System
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, restor3d, a prominent company in personalized orthopedic solutions using 3D printing, has revealed the complete commercial launch of the Aeros™ Modular Stem System. This system represents a progress in stemmed total ankle replacement aimed at boosting implant stability, conserving bone, and refining surgical effectiveness. Following a prosperous limited market introduction starting on May 5, 2025, over 250 procedures were carried out by 50+ different surgeons, drawing positive feedback.

data.title: N‑able Expands Its Technology Alliance Program with New Integrations, Advancing Incident Response and Hyperautomation
data.description: N-able, Inc. unveiled Zensec and Atomatik as new additions to its Technology Alliance Program (TAP). N-able, a global cybersecurity firm focusing on business resilience, introduced these integrations as part of TAP, which is a collaborative initiative with leading technology firms. Through the program, N-able aims to enhance its business resilience platform by fostering secure integrations. This move is geared towards facilitating scalable partnerships and providing enhanced collaboration opportunities within the platform. N-able is listed on NYSE as NABL.
